However, such training risks models learning to obfuscate their deception to evade the detector. Prior work has studied obfuscation only in artificial settings where models were directly rewarded for harmful output. We construct a realistic coding environment where reward hacking via hardcoding test cases naturally occurs, and show that obfuscation emerges in this setting. We introduce a taxonomy of possible outcomes when training against a deception detector. The model either remains honest, or becomes deceptive via two possible obfuscation strategies. (i) Obfuscated activations: the model outputs deceptive text while modifying its internal representations to no longer trigger the detector. (ii) Obfuscated policy: the model outputs deceptive text that evades the detector, typically by including a justification for the reward hack. Empirically, obfuscated activations arise from representation drift during RL, with or without a detector penalty. The probe penalty only incentivizes obfuscated policies; we theoretically show this is expected for policy gradient methods. Sufficiently high KL regularization and detector penalty can yield honest policies, establishing white-box deception detectors as viable training signals for tasks prone to reward hacking.
tldr: This paper investigates how AI systems learn to obfuscate deception to evade detectors in a realistic coding environment where reward hacking occurs, identifying two obfuscation strategies and suggesting that white-box deception detectors, with proper regularization, can encourage honesty.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了在reward hacking发生的真实编码环境中，AI系统如何学习混淆欺骗以逃避检测器，确定了两种混淆策略，并表明适当正则化的白盒欺骗检测器可以鼓励诚实。
summary_zh: 针对白盒欺骗检测器进行训练已被提议作为使人工智能系统诚实的方式。然而，这种训练存在模型学习混淆其欺骗行为以逃避检测器的风险。先前的工作仅在模型直接因有害输出而获得奖励的人工环境中研究了混淆。我们构建了一个真实的编码环境，其中通过硬编码测试用例进行的奖励黑客行为自然发生，并表明混淆在这种环境中出现。我们介绍了一个针对欺骗检测器进行训练时可能出现的结果分类。模型可以选择保持诚实，或者通过两种可能的混淆策略变得具有欺骗性。(i) 混淆激活：模型输出欺骗性文本，同时修改其内部表征，使其不再触发检测器。(ii) 混淆策略：模型输出逃避检测器的欺骗性文本，通常通过包含对奖励黑客行为的辩护。经验上，混淆激活源于强化学习期间的表征漂移，无论是否存在检测器惩罚。探针惩罚仅激励混淆策略；我们在理论上表明这对于策略梯度方法是预期的。 足够高的 KL 正则化和检测器惩罚可以产生诚实的策略，从而确立白盒欺骗检测器作为容易发生奖励黑客行为的任务的可行的训练信号。

title: CDRL: A Reinforcement Learning Framework Inspired by Cerebellar Circuits and Dendritic Computational Strategies
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has achieved notable performance in high-dimensional sequential decision-making tasks, yet remains limited by low sample efficiency, sensitivity to noise, and weak generalization under partial observability. Most existing approaches address these issues primarily through optimization strategies, while the role of architectural priors in shaping representation learning and decision dynamics is less explored. Inspired by structural principles of the cerebellum, we propose a biologically grounded RL architecture that incorporate large expansion, sparse connectivity, sparse activation, and dendritic-level modulation. Experiments on noisy, high-dimensional RL benchmarks show that both the cerebellar architecture and dendritic modulation consistently improve sample efficiency, robustness, and generalization compared to conventional designs. Sensitivity analysis of architectural parameters suggests that cerebellum-inspired structures can offer optimized performance for RL with constrained model parameters. Overall, our work underscores the value of cerebellar structural priors as effective inductive biases for RL.
tldr: This paper proposes a cerebellum-inspired reinforcement learning architecture to improve sample efficiency, robustness, and generalization in noisy high-dimensional RL tasks, demonstrating the value of biologically-inspired structural priors.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种受小脑启发的强化学习架构，旨在提高噪声高维RL任务中的样本效率、鲁棒性和泛化性，展示了生物启发式结构先验的价值。
summary_zh: 强化学习(RL)在高维序贯决策任务中取得了显著成果，但仍受限于样本效率低、对噪声敏感以及在部分可观察性下的泛化能力弱。现有的大多数方法主要通过优化策略来解决这些问题，而架构先验在塑造表征学习和决策动态方面的作用较少被探索。受到小脑结构原理的启发，我们提出了一种生物学基础的RL架构，该架构结合了大规模扩张、稀疏连接、稀疏激活和树突级调制。在嘈杂的高维RL基准测试上的实验表明，与传统设计相比，小脑架构和树突调制都能持续地提高样本效率、鲁棒性和泛化能力。架构参数的敏感性分析表明，受小脑启发的结构可以为参数受限的RL提供优化的性能。总的来说，我们的工作强调了小脑结构先验作为有效归纳偏置对RL的价值。

title: MaS-VQA: A Mask-and-Select Framework for Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering
summary: Knowledge-based Visual Question Answering (KB-VQA) requires models to answer questions by integrating visual information with external knowledge. However, retrieved knowledge is often noisy, partially irrelevant, or misaligned with the visual content, while internal model knowledge is difficult to control and interpret. Naive aggregation of these sources limits reasoning effectiveness and reduces answer accuracy. To address this, we propose MaS-VQA, a selection-driven framework that tightly couples explicit knowledge filtering with implicit knowledge reasoning. MaS-VQA first retrieves candidate passages and applies a Mask-and-Select mechanism to jointly prune irrelevant image regions and weakly relevant knowledge fragments, producing compact, high-signal multimodal knowledge . This filtered knowledge then guides the activation of internal knowledge in a constrained semantic space, enabling complementary co-modeling of explicit and implicit knowledge for robust answer prediction. Experiments on Encyclopedic-VQA and InfoSeek demonstrate consistent performance gains across multiple MLLM backbones, and ablations verify that the selection mechanism effectively reduces noise and enhances knowledge utilization.
tldr: The paper introduces MaS-VQA, a framework for knowledge-based VQA that uses a Mask-and-Select mechanism to filter irrelevant visual regions and knowledge fragments to improve answer accuracy by better integrating external and internal knowledge sources.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MaS-VQA，一个用于知识型VQA的框架，它使用Mask-and-Select机制来过滤不相关的视觉区域和知识片段，通过更好地整合外部和内部知识来源来提高答案准确性。
summary_zh: 基于知识的视觉问答（KB-VQA）要求模型通过整合视觉信息与外部知识来回答问题。然而，检索到的知识通常是嘈杂的、部分不相关的或与视觉内容不匹配的，而内部模型知识难以控制和解释。对这些来源的简单聚合限制了推理的有效性并降低了答案的准确性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了MaS-VQA，一个选择驱动的框架，将显式知识过滤与隐式知识推理紧密结合。MaS-VQA首先检索候选段落，并应用一种掩码选择机制来联合修剪无关图像区域和弱相关知识片段，从而产生紧凑、高信噪比的多模态知识。然后，这种过滤后的知识在受约束的语义空间中引导内部知识的激活，从而能够对显式和隐式知识进行互补协同建模，以实现稳健的答案预测。在Encyclopedic-VQA和InfoSeek上的实验表明，在多个MLLM骨干网络中，性能持续提升，并且消融实验验证了选择机制有效地减少了噪声并增强了知识利用率。

title: AgriWorld:A World Tools Protocol Framework for Verifiable Agricultural Reasoning with Code-Executing LLM Agents
summary: Foundation models for agriculture are increasingly trained on massive spatiotemporal data (e.g., multi-spectral remote sensing, soil grids, and field-level management logs) and achieve strong performance on forecasting and monitoring. However, these models lack language-based reasoning and interactive capabilities, limiting their usefulness in real-world agronomic workflows. Meanwhile, large language models (LLMs) excel at interpreting and generating text, but cannot directly reason over high-dimensional, heterogeneous agricultural datasets. We bridge this gap with an agentic framework for agricultural science. It provides a Python execution environment, AgriWorld, exposing unified tools for geospatial queries over field parcels, remote-sensing time-series analytics, crop growth simulation, and task-specific predictors (e.g., yield, stress, and disease risk). On top of this environment, we design a multi-turn LLM agent, Agro-Reflective, that iteratively writes code, observes execution results, and refines its analysis via an execute-observe-refine loop. We introduce AgroBench, with scalable data generation for diverse agricultural QA spanning lookups, forecasting, anomaly detection, and counterfactual "what-if" analysis. Experiments outperform text-only and direct tool-use baselines, validating execution-driven reflection for reliable agricultural reasoning.
tldr: The paper introduces AgriWorld, a framework that combines LLMs with a Python execution environment tailored for agricultural data analysis, enabling verifiable reasoning through code execution and iterative refinement. They also introduce a new benchmark, AgroBench, to evaluate the framework.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AgriWorld，一个将LLM与专门用于农业数据分析的Python执行环境相结合的框架，通过代码执行和迭代改进实现可验证的推理。他们还引入了一个新的基准测试AgroBench，用于评估该框架。
summary_zh: 农业领域的基石模型越来越多地基于大规模时空数据（例如，多光谱遥感数据、土壤格网和地块级管理日志）进行训练，并在预测和监控方面取得了显著成果。 然而，这些模型缺乏基于语言的推理和交互能力，限制了它们在实际农艺工作流程中的实用性。 同时，大型语言模型（LLMs）擅长解释和生成文本，但不能直接对高维异构农业数据集进行推理。 我们通过一个用于农业科学的代理框架来弥合这一差距。 它提供了一个Python执行环境AgriWorld，其中包含统一的工具，用于对地块进行地理空间查询、遥感时间序列分析、作物生长模拟以及特定任务的预测器（例如，产量、胁迫和病害风险）。 在此环境之上，我们设计了一个多轮LLM代理Agro-Reflective，它通过执行-观察-精炼循环迭代地编写代码，观察执行结果并改进其分析。 我们引入了AgroBench，它具有可扩展的数据生成能力，可用于涵盖查找、预测、异常检测和反事实“假设”分析的各种农业QA。 实验结果优于纯文本和直接工具使用基线，验证了执行驱动的反思对于可靠的农业推理的有效性。

title: When Remembering and Planning are Worth it: Navigating under Change
summary: We explore how different types and uses of memory can aid spatial navigation in changing uncertain environments. In the simple foraging task we study, every day, our agent has to find its way from its home, through barriers, to food. Moreover, the world is non-stationary: from day to day, the location of the barriers and food may change, and the agent's sensing such as its location information is uncertain and very limited. Any model construction, such as a map, and use, such as planning, needs to be robust against these challenges, and if any learning is to be useful, it needs to be adequately fast. We look at a range of strategies, from simple to sophisticated, with various uses of memory and learning. We find that an architecture that can incorporate multiple strategies is required to handle (sub)tasks of a different nature, in particular for exploration and search, when food location is not known, and for planning a good path to a remembered (likely) food location. An agent that utilizes non-stationary probability learning techniques to keep updating its (episodic) memories and that uses those memories to build maps and plan on the fly (imperfect maps, i.e. noisy and limited to the agent's experience) can be increasingly and substantially more efficient than the simpler (minimal-memory) agents, as the task difficulties such as distance to goal are raised, as long as the uncertainty, from localization and change, is not too large.
tldr: This paper investigates how agents can use memory and learning to navigate in dynamic, uncertain environments, finding that an architecture utilizing multiple strategies and non-stationary probability learning techniques performs best.
tldr_zh: 该论文研究了智能体如何在动态、不确定环境中利用记忆和学习进行导航，发现使用多种策略和非平稳概率学习技术的架构表现最佳。
summary_zh: 我们研究了不同类型和用途的记忆如何在不断变化的不确定环境中辅助空间导航。在我们研究的简单觅食任务中，每天，智能体都必须从它的家出发，穿过障碍物，找到食物。更重要的是，世界是非平稳的：随着时间的推移，障碍物和食物的位置可能会发生变化，并且智能体的感知，例如其位置信息，是不确定的且非常有限。任何模型构建，例如地图，以及使用，例如规划，都需要能够应对这些挑战，并且如果任何学习是有用的，那么它需要足够快。我们研究了一系列策略，从简单到复杂，以及记忆和学习的各种用途。我们发现，需要一种能够整合多种策略的架构来处理不同性质的（子）任务，特别是在探索和搜索（当食物位置未知时）以及规划到记忆中的（可能的）食物位置的良好路径。采用非平稳概率学习技术来不断更新其（情景）记忆，并使用这些记忆来构建地图并即时规划（不完美的地图，即有噪声且仅限于智能体的经验）的智能体，可以比简单的（最小记忆）智能体更有效率地提高效率，尤其是在任务难度（例如到目标的距离）增加时，只要来自定位和变化的的不确定性不是太大。

title: Knowing Isn't Understanding: Re-grounding Generative Proactivity with Epistemic and Behavioral Insight
summary: Generative AI agents equate understanding with resolving explicit queries, an assumption that confines interaction to what users can articulate. This assumption breaks down when users themselves lack awareness of what is missing, risky, or worth considering. In such conditions, proactivity is not merely an efficiency enhancement, but an epistemic necessity. We refer to this condition as epistemic incompleteness: where progress depends on engaging with unknown unknowns for effective partnership. Existing approaches to proactivity remain narrowly anticipatory, extrapolating from past behavior and presuming that goals are already well defined, thereby failing to support users meaningfully. However, surfacing possibilities beyond a user's current awareness is not inherently beneficial. Unconstrained proactive interventions can misdirect attention, overwhelm users, or introduce harm. Proactive agents, therefore, require behavioral grounding: principled constraints on when, how, and to what extent an agent should intervene. We advance the position that generative proactivity must be grounded both epistemically and behaviorally. Drawing on the philosophy of ignorance and research on proactive behavior, we argue that these theories offer critical guidance for designing agents that can engage responsibly and foster meaningful partnerships.
tldr: The paper argues that current proactive generative AI falls short because it doesn't address users' 'unknown unknowns.' It proposes grounding proactivity epistemically and behaviorally to foster meaningful partnerships, drawing from philosophy of ignorance and proactive behavior research.
tldr_zh: 该论文认为，目前的生成式人工智能的积极主动性不足，因为它没有解决用户“未知的未知”。它提出在认知和行为上对积极主动性进行基础性约束，以促进有意义的合作，并借鉴了无知哲学和积极主动行为研究。
summary_zh: 生成式人工智能智能体将理解等同于解决明确查询，这种假设将交互限制在用户能够表达的内容范围内。当用户自身缺乏对自己缺失、有风险或值得考虑事项的认知时，这种假设便会失效。在这种情况下，主动性不仅仅是一种效率提升，更是一种认知上的必要性。我们将这种情况称为认知不完备性：即进步依赖于与未知未知因素的互动，以实现有效的合作。现有的主动性方法仍然狭隘地倾向于预测，从过去的行为中进行外推，并假定目标已经明确定义，从而无法有意义地支持用户。然而，在用户当前的认知之外浮现可能性并非必然有益。不受约束的主动干预可能会误导注意力、让用户不堪重负或引入危害。因此，主动智能体需要行为基础：对智能体何时、如何以及在多大程度上进行干预的原则性约束。我们提出一个观点，即生成式主动性必须在认知和行为上都有根据。借鉴无知哲学和关于主动行为的研究，我们认为这些理论为设计能够负责任地参与并促进有意义合作的智能体提供了关键指导。

title: MyoInteract: A Framework for Fast Prototyping of Biomechanical HCI Tasks using Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL)-based biomechanical simulations have the potential to revolutionise HCI research and interaction design, but currently lack usability and interpretability. Using the Human Action Cycle as a design lens, we identify key limitations of biomechanical RL frameworks and develop MyoInteract, a novel framework for fast prototyping of biomechanical HCI tasks. MyoInteract allows designers to setup tasks, user models, and training parameters from an easy-to-use GUI within minutes. It trains and evaluates muscle-actuated simulated users within minutes, reducing training times by up to 98%. A workshop study with 12 interaction designers revealed that MyoInteract allowed novices in biomechanical RL to successfully setup, train, and assess goal-directed user movements within a single session. By transforming biomechanical RL from a days-long expert task into an accessible hour-long workflow, this work significantly lowers barriers to entry and accelerates iteration cycles in HCI biomechanics research.
tldr: MyoInteract is a new framework that simplifies and accelerates the prototyping of biomechanical HCI tasks using reinforcement learning, making it accessible to non-experts and significantly reducing training times. It aims to transform usage of biomechanical RL from days to hours.
tldr_zh: MyoInteract是一个新的框架，旨在简化和加速使用强化学习进行生物力学人机交互任务的原型设计。 这使得非专家可以轻松使用，并显著减少了训练时间。 它的目标是将使用生物力学RL从几天减少到几个小时。
summary_zh: 基于强化学习(RL)的生物力学仿真具有革新HCI研究与交互设计的潜力，但目前缺乏可用性和可解释性。以人类动作周期作为设计镜头，我们识别出生物力学RL框架的关键局限性，并开发了MyoInteract，一种用于生物力学HCI任务快速原型设计的新型框架。MyoInteract允许设计者在几分钟内通过易于使用的GUI设置任务、用户模型和训练参数。它可以在几分钟内训练和评估肌肉驱动的仿真用户，将训练时间缩短高达98%。一项包含12名交互设计师的研讨会研究表明，MyoInteract使得生物力学RL新手能够在一个会话中成功地设置、训练和评估目标导向的用户动作。通过将生物力学RL从耗时数天的专家任务转变为可及的1小时工作流程，这项工作显著降低了入门门槛并加速了HCI生物力学研究中的迭代周期。

title: Cold-Start Personalization via Training-Free Priors from Structured World Models
summary: Cold-start personalization requires inferring user preferences through interaction when no user-specific historical data is available. The core challenge is a routing problem: each task admits dozens of preference dimensions, yet individual users care about only a few, and which ones matter depends on who is asking. With a limited question budget, asking without structure will miss the dimensions that matter. Reinforcement learning is the natural formulation, but in multi-turn settings its terminal reward fails to exploit the factored, per-criterion structure of preference data, and in practice learned policies collapse to static question sequences that ignore user responses. We propose decomposing cold-start elicitation into offline structure learning and online Bayesian inference. Pep (Preference Elicitation with Priors) learns a structured world model of preference correlations offline from complete profiles, then performs training-free Bayesian inference online to select informative questions and predict complete preference profiles, including dimensions never asked about. The framework is modular across downstream solvers and requires only simple belief models. Across medical, mathematical, social, and commonsense reasoning, Pep achieves 80.8% alignment between generated responses and users' stated preferences versus 68.5% for RL, with 3-5x fewer interactions. When two users give different answers to the same question, Pep changes its follow-up 39-62% of the time versus 0-28% for RL. It does so with ~10K parameters versus 8B for RL, showing that the bottleneck in cold-start elicitation is the capability to exploit the factored structure of preference data.
tldr: This paper introduces Pep, a training-free Bayesian inference approach for cold-start personalization that leverages structured world models to efficiently elicit user preferences with fewer interactions and better alignment than reinforcement learning methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为 Pep 的免训练贝叶斯推理方法，用于冷启动个性化。该方法利用结构化世界模型，通过更少的交互有效引发用户偏好，并比强化学习方法具有更好的对齐效果。
summary_zh: 冷启动个性化需要在没有用户特定历史数据的情况下，通过交互来推断用户偏好。其核心挑战是一个路由问题：每个任务都包含数十个偏好维度，但单个用户只关心其中的少数几个，并且哪些维度重要取决于提问者是谁。在有限的提问预算下，无结构地提问会错过那些重要的维度。强化学习是一种自然的建模方式，但在多轮设置中，其最终奖励无法利用偏好数据中已分解的、按准则划分的结构，并且在实践中，学习到的策略会退化为忽略用户响应的静态问题序列。我们提出将冷启动启发分解为离线结构学习和在线贝叶斯推断。Pep（基于先验的偏好启发）离线地从完整档案中学习偏好相关性的结构化世界模型，然后在在线执行免训练的贝叶斯推断，以选择信息量大的问题，并预测完整的偏好档案，包括从未询问过的维度。该框架对于下游求解器是模块化的，并且只需要简单的信念模型。在医疗、数学、社交和常识推理等领域，Pep生成的响应与用户声明的偏好之间的对齐度达到80.8%，而强化学习为68.5%，并且交互次数减少3-5倍。当两个用户对同一个问题给出不同的答案时，Pep改变其后续问题的频率为39-62%，而强化学习为0-28%。它使用的参数约为1万个，而强化学习为80亿个，表明冷启动启发的瓶颈在于利用偏好数据分解结构的能力。

title: Semantic-Guided 3D Gaussian Splatting for Transient Object Removal
summary: Transient objects in casual multi-view captures cause ghosting artifacts in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) reconstruction. Existing solutions relied on scene decomposition at significant memory cost or on motion-based heuristics that were vulnerable to parallax ambiguity. A semantic filtering framework was proposed for category-aware transient removal using vision-language models. CLIP similarity scores between rendered views and distractor text prompts were accumulated per-Gaussian across training iterations. Gaussians exceeding a calibrated threshold underwent opacity regularization and periodic pruning. Unlike motion-based approaches, semantic classification resolved parallax ambiguity by identifying object categories independently of motion patterns. Experiments on the RobustNeRF benchmark demonstrated consistent improvement in reconstruction quality over vanilla 3DGS across four sequences, while maintaining minimal memory overhead and real-time rendering performance. Threshold calibration and comparisons with baselines validated semantic guidance as a practical strategy for transient removal in scenarios with predictable distractor categories.
tldr: This paper introduces a semantic-guided approach using vision-language models to remove transient objects from 3D Gaussian Splatting reconstructions, improving quality and handling parallax ambiguity better than motion-based methods with minimal overhead.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种语义引导方法，利用视觉-语言模型从3D高斯溅射重建中移除瞬态对象，提高了质量，并且比基于运动的方法更好地处理了视差歧义，同时开销最小。
summary_zh: 非结构化多视角拍摄中的瞬态物体会导致 3D 高斯溅射 (3DGS) 重建中出现重影伪影。 现有解决方案依赖于高内存消耗的场景分解，或易受视差歧义影响的基于运动的启发式方法。本文提出了一种语义过滤框架，利用视觉-语言模型实现类别感知的瞬态物体移除。 在训练迭代过程中，每个高斯点累积渲染视图与干扰文本提示之间的 CLIP 相似度得分。 超过校准阈值的高斯点进行不透明度正则化和周期性剪枝。 与基于运动的方法不同，语义分类通过独立于运动模式识别物体类别来解决视差歧义。 在 RobustNeRF 基准测试上的实验表明，在四个序列中，与原始 3DGS 相比，重建质量得到了持续改善，同时保持了最小的内存开销和实时的渲染性能。 阈值校准以及与基线的比较验证了语义指导作为在具有可预测干扰类别场景中移除瞬态物体的可行策略。

title: On the Out-of-Distribution Generalization of Reasoning in Multimodal LLMs for Simple Visual Planning Tasks
summary: Integrating reasoning in large language models and large vision-language models has recently led to significant improvement of their capabilities. However, the generalization of reasoning models is still vaguely defined and poorly understood. In this work, we present an evaluation framework to rigorously examine how well chain-of-thought (CoT) approaches generalize on a simple planning task. Specifically, we consider a grid-based navigation task in which a model is provided with a map and must output a sequence of moves that guides a player from a start position to a goal while avoiding obstacles. The versatility of the task and its data allows us to fine-tune model variants using different input representations (visual and textual) and CoT reasoning strategies, and systematically evaluate them under both in-distribution (ID) and out-of-distribution (OOD) test conditions. Our experiments show that, while CoT reasoning improves in-distribution generalization across all representations, out-of-distribution generalization (e.g., to larger maps) remains very limited in most cases when controlling for trivial matches with the ID data. Surprisingly, we find that reasoning traces which combine multiple text formats yield the best (and non-trivial) OOD generalization. Finally, purely text-based models consistently outperform those utilizing image-based inputs, including a recently proposed approach relying on latent space reasoning.
tldr: This paper evaluates the out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization capabilities of multimodal language models with chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning on a visual navigation planning task, finding limited OOD performance and that text-based models outperform image-based ones.
tldr_zh: 本文评估了多模态语言模型在视觉导航规划任务中使用思维链（CoT）推理的分布外（OOD）泛化能力，发现OOD性能有限，并且基于文本的模型优于基于图像的模型。
summary_zh: 将推理能力集成到大型语言模型和大型视觉语言模型中，最近显著提升了它们的能力。然而，推理模型的泛化性仍然定义模糊，且理解不足。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个评估框架，以严格审查思维链（CoT）方法在简单规划任务中的泛化能力。具体而言，我们考虑一个基于网格的导航任务，其中模型被提供一张地图，并且必须输出一系列动作，引导一个玩家从起始位置到达目标位置，同时避开障碍物。该任务及其数据的通用性使我们能够使用不同的输入表示（视觉和文本）以及CoT推理策略来微调模型变体，并在同分布（ID）和异分布（OOD）的测试条件下系统地评估它们。我们的实验表明，虽然CoT推理在所有表示形式中都能提高同分布泛化性，但在控制与同分布数据的简单匹配的情况下，异分布泛化性（例如，对更大地图的泛化）在大多数情况下仍然非常有限。令人惊讶的是，我们发现结合多种文本格式的推理轨迹能够产生最佳（且非平凡的）异分布泛化。最后，纯文本模型始终优于利用基于图像的输入的模型，包括一种最近提出的依赖于隐空间推理的方法。

title: Beyond Labels: Information-Efficient Human-in-the-Loop Learning using Ranking and Selection Queries
summary: Integrating human expertise into machine learning systems often reduces the role of experts to labeling oracles, a paradigm that limits the amount of information exchanged and fails to capture the nuances of human judgment. We address this challenge by developing a human-in-the-loop framework to learn binary classifiers with rich query types, consisting of item ranking and exemplar selection. We first introduce probabilistic human response models for these rich queries motivated by the relationship experimentally observed between the perceived implicit score of an item and its distance to the unknown classifier. Using these models, we then design active learning algorithms that leverage the rich queries to increase the information gained per interaction. We provide theoretical bounds on sample complexity and develop a tractable and computationally efficient variational approximation. Through experiments with simulated annotators derived from crowdsourced word-sentiment and image-aesthetic datasets, we demonstrate significant reductions on sample complexity. We further extend active learning strategies to select queries that maximize information rate, explicitly balancing informational value against annotation cost. This algorithm in the word sentiment classification task reduces learning time by more than 57\% compared to traditional label-only active learning.
tldr: This paper introduces a human-in-the-loop learning framework that goes beyond simple labeling by employing ranking and selection queries, leading to significant improvements in sample complexity and learning efficiency, particularly in word sentiment classification.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种人机协作学习框架，该框架超越了简单的标注，采用了排序和选择查询，从而显著提高了样本复杂度和学习效率，尤其是在词语情感分类方面。
summary_zh: 将人类专业知识整合到机器学习系统中通常会将专家的角色简化为标注器或仲裁者，这种模式限制了信息交换量，并且无法捕捉人类判断的细微之处。为了应对这一挑战，我们开发了一个人机协同框架，用于学习具有丰富查询类型的二元分类器，这些查询类型包括项目排序和范例选择。我们首先为这些丰富的查询引入概率人类响应模型，其动机来自于实验观察到的一个项目感知到的隐含得分与其到未知分类器距离之间的关系。利用这些模型，我们设计了主动学习算法，利用丰富的查询来增加每次交互获得的信息量。我们提供了样本复杂度的理论界限，并开发了一个易于处理且计算高效的变分近似。通过使用从众包的词语情感和图像美学数据集中导出的模拟标注者进行的实验，我们证明样本复杂度显著降低。我们进一步扩展了主动学习策略，以选择最大化信息速率的查询，明确地平衡信息价值与标注成本。在词语情感分类任务中，与传统的纯标签主动学习相比，该算法将学习时间减少了57%以上。

title: Proactive Conversational Assistant for a Procedural Manual Task based on Audio and IMU
summary: Real-time conversational assistants for procedural tasks often depend on video input, which can be computationally expensive and compromise user privacy. For the first time, we propose a real-time conversational assistant that provides comprehensive guidance for a procedural task using only lightweight privacy-preserving modalities such as audio and IMU inputs from a user's wearable device to understand the context. This assistant proactively communicates step-by-step instructions to a user performing a furniture assembly task, and answers user questions. We construct a dataset containing conversations where the assistant guides the user in performing the task. On observing that an off-the-shelf language model is a very talkative assistant, we design a novel User Whim Agnostic (UWA) LoRA finetuning method which improves the model's ability to suppress less informative dialogues, while maintaining its tendency to communicate important instructions. This leads to >30% improvement in the F-score. Finetuning the model also results in a 16x speedup by eliminating the need to provide in-context examples in the prompt. We further describe how such an assistant is implemented on edge devices with no dependence on the cloud.
tldr: This paper introduces a real-time, privacy-preserving conversational assistant for procedural tasks using audio and IMU data, addressing limitations of video-based systems. They propose a novel finetuning method (UWA LoRA) for improved performance and demonstrate edge device deployment.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种实时的、保护隐私的对话式助手，使用音频和 IMU 数据来指导程序性任务，解决了基于视频的系统的局限性。他们提出了一种新的微调方法 (UWA LoRA) 以提高性能，并展示了边缘设备的部署。
summary_zh: 针对程序性任务的实时对话助手通常依赖于视频输入，这会带来巨大的计算开销并可能损害用户隐私。我们首次提出了一种实时对话助手，它仅使用轻量级的保护隐私的模态（如来自用户可穿戴设备的音频和IMU输入）来理解上下文，从而为程序性任务提供全面的指导。该助手主动向执行家具组装任务的用户传达逐步指示，并回答用户的问题。我们构建了一个数据集，其中包含助手指导用户执行任务的对话。观察到现成的语言模型是一个非常健谈的助手后，我们设计了一种新颖的用户意图无关（UWA）LoRA微调方法，该方法提高了模型抑制信息量较少的对话的能力，同时保持其传达重要指令的倾向。这带来了超过30%的F-score提升。微调模型还通过消除在提示中提供上下文示例的需求，实现了16倍的速度提升。我们进一步描述了如何在边缘设备上实现这种助手，而无需依赖云。

title: Fairness over Equality: Correcting Social Incentives in Asymmetric Sequential Social Dilemmas
summary: Sequential Social Dilemmas (SSDs) provide a key framework for studying how cooperation emerges when individual incentives conflict with collective welfare. In Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning, these problems are often addressed by incorporating intrinsic drives that encourage prosocial or fair behavior. However, most existing methods assume that agents face identical incentives in the dilemma and require continuous access to global information about other agents to assess fairness. In this work, we introduce asymmetric variants of well-known SSD environments and examine how natural differences between agents influence cooperation dynamics. Our findings reveal that existing fairness-based methods struggle to adapt under asymmetric conditions by enforcing raw equality that wrongfully incentivize defection. To address this, we propose three modifications: (i) redefining fairness by accounting for agents' reward ranges, (ii) introducing an agent-based weighting mechanism to better handle inherent asymmetries, and (iii) localizing social feedback to make the methods effective under partial observability without requiring global information sharing. Experimental results show that in asymmetric scenarios, our method fosters faster emergence of cooperative policies compared to existing approaches, without sacrificing scalability or practicality.
tldr: This paper addresses the limitations of existing fairness-based Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning methods in asymmetric sequential social dilemmas by introducing modifications that account for agent reward ranges, use agent-based weighting, and localize social feedback, leading to improved cooperation.
tldr_zh: 本文旨在解决现有基于公平性的多智能体强化学习方法在非对称序贯社会困境中的局限性，通过引入考虑智能体奖励范围、使用基于智能体的权重和局部化社会反馈的修改，从而改善合作。
summary_zh: 序列社会困境（SSDs）为研究当个体激励与集体福利相冲突时，合作如何涌现提供了一个关键框架。在多智能体强化学习中，这些问题通常通过整合鼓励亲社会或公平行为的内在驱动来解决。然而，大多数现有方法假设智能体在困境中面临相同的激励，并且需要持续访问关于其他智能体的全局信息来评估公平性。在这项工作中，我们引入了著名SSD环境的非对称变体，并考察了智能体之间的自然差异如何影响合作动态。我们的研究结果表明，现有的基于公平性的方法在非对称条件下难以适应，因为它们强制执行原始平等，从而错误地激励了背叛行为。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了三个修改：（i）通过考虑智能体的奖励范围来重新定义公平性，（ii）引入基于智能体的加权机制，以更好地处理固有的非对称性，以及（iii）将社会反馈本地化，使这些方法在部分可观测性下有效，而无需全局信息共享。实验结果表明，在非对称情景中，与现有方法相比，我们的方法能够更快地促进合作策略的涌现，同时不牺牲可扩展性或实用性。

title: SpecFuse: A Spectral-Temporal Fusion Predictive Control Framework for UAV Landing on Oscillating Marine Platforms
summary: Autonomous landing of Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) on oscillating marine platforms is severely constrained by wave-induced multi-frequency oscillations, wind disturbances, and prediction phase lags in motion prediction. Existing methods either treat platform motion as a general random process or lack explicit modeling of wave spectral characteristics, leading to suboptimal performance under dynamic sea conditions. To address these limitations, we propose SpecFuse: a novel spectral-temporal fusion predictive control framework that integrates frequency-domain wave decomposition with time-domain recursive state estimation for high-precision 6-DoF motion forecasting of Uncrewed Surface Vehicles (USVs). The framework explicitly models dominant wave harmonics to mitigate phase lags, refining predictions in real time via IMU data without relying on complex calibration. Additionally, we design a hierarchical control architecture featuring a sampling-based HPO-RRT* algorithm for dynamic trajectory planning under non-convex constraints and a learning-augmented predictive controller that fuses data-driven disturbance compensation with optimization-based execution. Extensive validations (2,000 simulations + 8 lake experiments) show our approach achieves a 3.2 cm prediction error, 4.46 cm landing deviation, 98.7% / 87.5% success rates (simulation / real-world), and 82 ms latency on embedded hardware, outperforming state-of-the-art methods by 44%-48% in accuracy. Its robustness to wave-wind coupling disturbances supports critical maritime missions such as search and rescue and environmental monitoring. All code, experimental configurations, and datasets will be released as open-source to facilitate reproducibility.
tldr: The paper introduces SpecFuse, a novel predictive control framework for UAV landing on oscillating marine platforms, which integrates spectral-temporal fusion for high-precision motion forecasting and demonstrates superior performance compared to existing methods in both simulation and real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为SpecFuse的新型预测控制框架，用于无人机在振荡海洋平台上着陆。该框架结合了频谱-时间融合技术以实现高精度运动预测，并在仿真和实际实验中表现出优于现有方法的性能。
summary_zh: 无人机自主降落在振荡的海洋平台上受到波浪引起的多种频率振荡、风扰动以及运动预测中的预测相滞的严重制约。现有方法要么将平台运动视为一般的随机过程，要么缺乏对波谱特征的显式建模，导致在动态海况下性能欠佳。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出SpecFuse：一种新颖的谱时融合预测控制框架，它将频域波浪分解与时域递归状态估计相结合，用于无人水面艇（USV）的高精度六自由度运动预测。该框架显式地建模了主要波浪谐波以减轻相滞，并通过IMU数据实时优化预测，而无需依赖复杂的校准。此外，我们设计了一种分层控制架构，该架构具有基于采样的HPO-RRT*算法，用于非凸约束下的动态轨迹规划，以及一种学习增强型预测控制器，它将数据驱动的扰动补偿与基于优化的执行相结合。大量的验证（2,000次仿真 + 8次湖泊实验）表明，我们的方法实现了3.2厘米的预测误差、4.46厘米的着陆偏差、98.7% / 87.5%的成功率（仿真 / 真实世界）以及82毫秒的嵌入式硬件延迟，在准确性方面优于最先进的方法44%-48%。它对波浪-风耦合扰动的鲁棒性支持关键的海事任务，如搜索和救援以及环境监测。所有代码、实验配置和数据集将以开源形式发布，以方便重现。

title: A Comparison of Bayesian Prediction Techniques for Mobile Robot Trajectory Tracking
summary: This paper presents a performance comparison of different estimation and prediction techniques applied to the problem of tracking multiple robots. The main performance criteria are the magnitude of the estimation or prediction error, the computational effort and the robustness of each method to non-Gaussian noise. Among the different techniques compared are the well known Kalman filters and their different variants (e.g. extended and unscented), and the more recent techniques relying on Sequential Monte Carlo Sampling methods, such as particle filters and Gaussian Mixture Sigma Point Particle Filter.
tldr: This paper compares various Bayesian estimation and prediction techniques, including Kalman filters and particle filters, for tracking multiple robots, focusing on error magnitude, computational cost, and robustness to non-Gaussian noise.
tldr_zh: 本文比较了各种贝叶斯估计和预测技术，包括卡尔曼滤波器和粒子滤波器，用于跟踪多个机器人，重点关注误差幅度、计算成本和对非高斯噪声的鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 本文对应用于多机器人跟踪问题的不同估计和预测技术进行了性能比较。主要性能指标是估计或预测误差的大小、计算量以及每种方法对非高斯噪声的鲁棒性。比较的不同技术包括广为人知的卡尔曼滤波器及其各种变体（例如，扩展卡尔曼滤波和无迹卡尔曼滤波），以及最新依赖于序贯蒙特卡洛采样方法的技术，例如粒子滤波器和高斯混合 sigma 点粒子滤波器。

title: DAV-GSWT: Diffusion-Active-View Sampling for Data-Efficient Gaussian Splatting Wang Tiles
summary: The emergence of 3D Gaussian Splatting has fundamentally redefined the capabilities of photorealistic neural rendering by enabling high-throughput synthesis of complex environments. While procedural methods like Wang Tiles have recently been integrated to facilitate the generation of expansive landscapes, these systems typically remain constrained by a reliance on densely sampled exemplar reconstructions. We present DAV-GSWT, a data-efficient framework that leverages diffusion priors and active view sampling to synthesize high-fidelity Gaussian Splatting Wang Tiles from minimal input observations. By integrating a hierarchical uncertainty quantification mechanism with generative diffusion models, our approach autonomously identifies the most informative viewpoints while hallucinating missing structural details to ensure seamless tile transitions. Experimental results indicate that our system significantly reduces the required data volume while maintaining the visual integrity and interactive performance necessary for large-scale virtual environments.
tldr: The paper introduces DAV-GSWT, a data-efficient method using diffusion priors and active view sampling to generate high-fidelity Gaussian Splatting Wang Tiles from minimal observations, enabling the creation of large virtual environments with reduced data requirements.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 DAV-GSWT，一种数据高效的方法，它利用扩散先验和主动视图采样，从最少的观测数据生成高保真的 Gaussian Splatting Wang Tiles，从而能以更少的数据需求创建大型虚拟环境。
summary_zh:
基于扩散先验和主动视角采样的数据高效高斯溅射Wang瓦片生成框架

3D高斯溅射的出现从根本上重新定义了照片级真实感神经渲染的能力，实现了复杂环境的高吞吐量合成。虽然最近集成了诸如Wang瓦片之类的程序化方法来促进广阔景观的生成，但这些系统通常仍然受到对密集采样样本重建的依赖性的限制。我们提出了DAV-GSWT，一个数据高效框架，它利用扩散先验和主动视角采样，从最少的输入观测值中合成高保真度的高斯溅射Wang瓦片。通过将分层不确定性量化机制与生成式扩散模型相结合，我们的方法能够自主识别信息量最大的视角，同时推断出缺失的结构细节，以确保无缝的瓦片过渡。实验结果表明，我们的系统在显著减少所需数据量的同时，保持了大规模虚拟环境所需的视觉完整性和交互性能。

title: Latency-aware Human-in-the-Loop Reinforcement Learning for Semantic Communications
summary: Semantic communication promises task-aligned transmission but must reconcile semantic fidelity with stringent latency guarantees in immersive and safety-critical services. This paper introduces a time-constrained human-in-the-loop reinforcement learning (TC-HITL-RL) framework that embeds human feedback, semantic utility, and latency control within a semantic-aware Open radio access network (RAN) architecture. We formulate semantic adaptation driven by human feedback as a constrained Markov decision process (CMDP) whose state captures semantic quality, human preferences, queue slack, and channel dynamics, and solve it via a primal--dual proximal policy optimization algorithm with action shielding and latency-aware reward shaping. The resulting policy preserves PPO-level semantic rewards while tightening the variability of both air-interface and near-real-time RAN intelligent controller processing budgets. Simulations over point-to-multipoint links with heterogeneous deadlines show that TC-HITL-RL consistently meets per-user timing constraints, outperforms baseline schedulers in reward, and stabilizes resource consumption, providing a practical blueprint for latency-aware semantic adaptation.
tldr: The paper introduces a time-constrained human-in-the-loop reinforcement learning (TC-HITL-RL) framework for semantic communications, optimizing for both semantic utility and latency guarantees in Open RAN architectures. It uses a CMDP formulation and proximal policy optimization to achieve this, demonstrating improved performance in simulations.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于语义通信的时间约束人环强化学习（TC-HITL-RL）框架，在开放式RAN架构中优化语义效用和延迟保证。它采用CMDP公式和近端策略优化来实现这一目标，并在仿真中表现出改进的性能。
summary_zh: 语义通信有望实现任务对齐的传输，但必须在沉浸式和安全关键型服务中协调语义保真度和严格的延迟保证。本文提出了一种时间约束的人在环路强化学习（TC-HITL-RL）框架，该框架将人类反馈、语义效用和延迟控制嵌入到语义感知的开放式无线接入网（RAN）架构中。我们将由人类反馈驱动的语义自适应建模为一个约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP），其状态捕获语义质量、人类偏好、队列松弛和信道动态，并通过一种具有动作屏蔽和延迟感知奖励塑造的原对偶近端策略优化算法来求解。由此产生的策略保留了PPO级别的语义奖励，同时收紧了空口和近实时RAN智能控制器处理预算的可变性。对具有异构截止期限的点对多点链路进行的仿真表明，TC-HITL-RL始终满足每用户的时序约束，在奖励方面优于基线调度器，并稳定了资源消耗，为延迟感知的语义自适应提供了一个实用的蓝图。

title: Robot-Assisted Social Dining as a White Glove Service
summary: Robot-assisted feeding enables people with disabilities who require assistance eating to enjoy a meal independently and with dignity. However, existing systems have only been tested in-lab or in-home, leaving in-the-wild social dining contexts (e.g., restaurants) largely unexplored. Designing a robot for such contexts presents unique challenges, such as dynamic and unsupervised dining environments that a robot needs to account for and respond to. Through speculative participatory design with people with disabilities, supported by semi-structured interviews and a custom AI-based visual storyboarding tool, we uncovered ideal scenarios for in-the-wild social dining. Our key insight suggests that such systems should: embody the principles of a white glove service where the robot (1) supports multimodal inputs and unobtrusive outputs; (2) has contextually sensitive social behavior and prioritizes the user; (3) has expanded roles beyond feeding; (4) adapts to other relationships at the dining table. Our work has implications for in-the-wild and group contexts of robot-assisted feeding.
tldr: This paper explores the design of robot-assisted feeding systems for social dining contexts, emphasizing a 'white glove service' approach with multimodal inputs, contextual social behavior, and expanded roles beyond feeding.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了在社交用餐环境中机器人辅助喂食系统的设计，强调了一种“白手套服务”方法，该方法具有多模式输入、上下文相关的社会行为以及超出喂食的扩展角色。
summary_zh: 机器人辅助进食使需要帮助进食的残疾人士能够独立且有尊严地享用美食。然而，现有的系统仅在实验室或家庭环境中进行过测试，使得户外社交用餐环境（例如，餐厅）在很大程度上未被探索。为这种环境设计机器人带来了独特的挑战，例如机器人需要考虑并响应的动态和无人监督的用餐环境。通过与残疾人士进行的推测性参与式设计，并辅以半结构化访谈和定制的基于人工智能的可视化故事板工具，我们发现了户外社交用餐的理想场景。我们的主要见解表明，此类系统应：体现白手套服务的原则，即机器人 (1) 支持多模态输入和不引人注目的输出；(2) 具有上下文敏感的社交行为并优先考虑用户；(3) 具有超出进食的扩展角色；(4) 适应餐桌上的其他人际关系。我们的工作对机器人辅助进食的户外和群体环境具有重要意义。

title: Fluoroscopy-Constrained Magnetic Robot Control via Zernike-Based Field Modeling and Nonlinear MPC
summary: Magnetic actuation enables surgical robots to navigate complex anatomical pathways while reducing tissue trauma and improving surgical precision. However, clinical deployment is limited by the challenges of controlling such systems under fluoroscopic imaging, which provides low frame rate and noisy pose feedback. This paper presents a control framework that remains accurate and stable under such conditions by combining a nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) framework that directly outputs coil currents, an analytically differentiable magnetic field model based on Zernike polynomials, and a Kalman filter to estimate the robot state. Experimental validation is conducted with two magnetic robots in a 3D-printed fluid workspace and a spine phantom replicating drug delivery in the epidural space. Results show the proposed control method remains highly accurate when feedback is downsampled to 3 Hz with added Gaussian noise (sigma = 2 mm), mimicking clinical fluoroscopy. In the spine phantom experiments, the proposed method successfully executed a drug delivery trajectory with a root mean square (RMS) position error of 1.18 mm while maintaining safe clearance from critical anatomical boundaries.
tldr: This paper presents a control framework combining NMPC, Zernike polynomials-based magnetic field modeling, and a Kalman filter for controlling magnetic robots under noisy, low frame-rate fluoroscopic imaging, validated through in-vitro experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种控制框架，结合了非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）、基于泽尼克多项式的磁场建模和卡尔曼滤波器，用于在嘈杂、低帧率的透视成像下控制磁机器人，并通过体外实验进行了验证。
summary_zh: 磁驱动技术使外科手术机器人能够在复杂的解剖通道中导航，同时减少组织创伤并提高手术精度。然而，由于在荧光透视成像下控制此类系统存在挑战（荧光透视成像提供低帧率和噪声大的姿态反馈），临床部署受到了限制。本文提出了一种控制框架，该框架通过结合直接输出线圈电流的非线性模型预测控制(NMPC)框架、基于Zernike多项式的解析可微磁场模型以及用于估计机器人状态的卡尔曼滤波器，在上述条件下保持准确性和稳定性。实验验证是在3D打印的流体工作空间和模拟硬膜外腔药物递送的脊柱模型中，使用两个磁力机器人进行的。结果表明，当反馈被降采样到3 Hz并添加高斯噪声（sigma = 2 mm）时，该控制方法仍然具有很高的精度，这与临床荧光透视成像类似。在脊柱模型实验中，所提出的方法成功地执行了药物递送轨迹，其均方根(RMS)位置误差为1.18 mm，同时保持了与关键解剖边界的安全距离。

title: A ROS2 Benchmarking Framework for Hierarchical Control Strategies in Mobile Robots for Mediterranean Greenhouses
summary: Mobile robots operating in agroindustrial environments, such as Mediterranean greenhouses, are subject to challenging conditions, including uneven terrain, variable friction, payload changes, and terrain slopes, all of which significantly affect control performance and stability. Despite the increasing adoption of robotic platforms in agriculture, the lack of standardized, reproducible benchmarks impedes fair comparisons and systematic evaluations of control strategies under realistic operating conditions. This paper presents a comprehensive benchmarking framework for evaluating mobile robot controllers in greenhouse environments. The proposed framework integrates an accurate three dimensional model of the environment, a physics based simulator, and a hierarchical control architecture comprising low, mid, and high level control layers. Three benchmark categories are defined to enable modular assessment, ranging from actuator level control to full autonomous navigation. Additionally, three disturbance scenarios payload variation, terrain type, and slope are explicitly modeled to replicate real world agricultural conditions. To ensure objective and reproducible evaluation, standardized performance metrics are introduced, including the Squared Absolute Error (SAE), the Squared Control Input (SCI), and composite performance indices. Statistical analysis based on repeated trials is employed to mitigate the influence of sensor noise and environmental variability. The framework is further enhanced by a plugin based architecture that facilitates seamless integration of user defined controllers and planners. The proposed benchmark provides a robust and extensible tool for the quantitative comparison of classical, predictive, and planning based control strategies in realistic conditions, bridging the gap between simulation based analysis and real world agroindustrial applications.
tldr: This paper introduces a ROS2 benchmarking framework for hierarchical control strategies in mobile robots operating in Mediterranean greenhouses, focusing on realistic environmental conditions and standardized performance metrics.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个用于地中海温室移动机器人的ROS2基准测试框架，该框架侧重于现实环境条件和标准化性能指标，用于评估分层控制策略。
summary_zh: 在地中海温室等农业工业环境中运行的移动机器人面临着诸多挑战性条件，包括不平坦地形、可变摩擦、有效载荷变化和地形坡度，这些都会显著影响控制性能和稳定性。尽管机器人平台在农业领域的应用日益广泛，但缺乏标准化的、可复现的基准测试阻碍了在真实运行条件下对控制策略进行公平比较和系统评估。本文提出了一个综合性的基准测试框架，用于评估温室环境中的移动机器人控制器。所提出的框架集成了环境的精确三维模型、基于物理的模拟器以及包含低、中、高级控制层的分层控制架构。定义了三个基准类别，以实现模块化评估，范围从执行器级控制到完全自主导航。此外，还对有效载荷变化、地形类型和坡度这三个干扰场景进行了显式建模，以模拟真实世界的农业条件。为了确保客观和可复现的评估，引入了标准化性能指标，包括平方绝对误差（SAE）、平方控制输入（SCI）和综合性能指标。采用基于重复试验的统计分析来减轻传感器噪声和环境变化的影响。该框架通过基于插件（Plugin）的架构进一步增强，该架构有助于用户定义的控制器和规划器无缝集成。所提出的基准测试提供了一个稳健且可扩展的工具，用于在真实条件下对经典、预测和基于规划的控制策略进行定量比较，从而弥合了基于仿真的分析与真实农业工业应用之间的差距。

title: Secure and Energy-Efficient Wireless Agentic AI Networks
summary: In this paper, we introduce a secure wireless agentic AI network comprising one supervisor AI agent and multiple other AI agents to provision quality of service (QoS) for users' reasoning tasks while ensuring confidentiality of private knowledge and reasoning outcomes. Specifically, the supervisor AI agent can dynamically assign other AI agents to participate in cooperative reasoning, while the unselected AI agents act as friendly jammers to degrade the eavesdropper's interception performance. To extend the service duration of AI agents, an energy minimization problem is formulated that jointly optimizes AI agent selection, base station (BS) beamforming, and AI agent transmission power, subject to latency and reasoning accuracy constraints. To address the formulated problem, we propose two resource allocation schemes, ASC and LAW, which first decompose it into three sub-problems. Specifically, ASC optimizes each sub-problem iteratively using the proposed alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM)-based algorithm, semi-definite relaxation (SDR), and successive convex approximation (SCA), while LAW tackles each sub-problem using the proposed large language model (LLM) optimizer within an agentic workflow. The experimental results show that the proposed solutions can reduce network energy consumption by up to 59.1% compared to other benchmark schemes. Furthermore, the proposed schemes are validated using a practical agentic AI system based on Qwen, demonstrating satisfactory reasoning accuracy across various public benchmarks.
tldr: This paper proposes secure and energy-efficient resource allocation schemes for wireless agentic AI networks using ADMM, SDR, SCA, and an LLM optimizer within an agentic workflow, validated on Qwen.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种安全且节能的无线代理AI网络资源分配方案，使用ADMM，SDR，SCA以及代理工作流程中的LLM优化器，并在Qwen上进行了验证。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种安全的无线代理人工智能网络，该网络由一个监督AI代理和多个其他AI代理组成，旨在为用户的推理任务提供服务质量(QoS)保障，同时确保私有知识和推理结果的保密性。具体而言，监督AI代理可以动态地分配其他AI代理参与协同推理，而未被选中的AI代理则充当对窃听者实施干扰的友好干扰器，以降低其窃听性能。为了延长AI代理的服务持续时间，我们建立了一个能量最小化问题，该问题联合优化AI代理选择、基站(BS)波束成形和AI代理的发射功率，并受限于延迟和推理精度约束。为了解决所提出的问题，我们提出了两种资源分配方案，ASC和LAW，它们首先将问题分解为三个子问题。 具体地，ASC采用所提出的基于交替方向乘子法(ADMM)的算法、半定松弛(SDR)和逐次凸逼近(SCA)迭代地优化每个子问题，而LAW则在代理工作流中使用所提出的大型语言模型(LLM)优化器解决每个子问题。 实验结果表明，与其它基准方案相比，所提出的解决方案可以将网络能耗降低高达59.1%。 此外，我们使用基于Qwen的实际代理人工智能系统验证了所提出的方案，证明了其在各种公共基准测试中都能达到令人满意的推理精度。

title: An Industrial Dataset for Scene Acquisitions and Functional Schematics Alignment
summary: Aligning functional schematics with 2D and 3D scene acquisitions is crucial for building digital twins, especially for old industrial facilities that lack native digital models. Current manual alignment using images and LiDAR data does not scale due to tediousness and complexity of industrial sites. Inconsistencies between schematics and reality, and the scarcity of public industrial datasets, make the problem both challenging and underexplored. This paper introduces IRIS-v2, a comprehensive dataset to support further research. It includes images, point clouds, 2D annotated boxes and segmentation masks, a CAD model, 3D pipe routing information, and the P&ID (Piping and Instrumentation Diagram). The alignment is experimented on a practical case study, aiming at reducing the time required for this task by combining segmentation and graph matching.
tldr: The paper introduces IRIS-v2, a new industrial dataset for aligning functional schematics with 2D/3D scene acquisitions, aiming to simplify digital twin creation for legacy industrial facilities. It addresses the lack of public industrial data and manual alignment challenges.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了IRIS-v2，一个新的工业数据集，用于将功能原理图与2D/3D场景采集对齐，旨在简化旧工业设施的数字孪生创建。它解决了缺乏公共工业数据和手动对齐挑战的问题。
summary_zh: 将功能原理图与 2D 和 3D 场景采集数据对齐，对于构建数字孪生至关重要，特别是对于缺乏原生数字模型的旧工业设施而言。目前，使用图像和 LiDAR 数据的手动对齐方法无法扩展，原因是工业现场的繁琐性和复杂性。原理图与现实之间的差异以及公共工业数据集的稀缺性，使得该问题既具有挑战性又未被充分探索。本文介绍了 IRIS-v2，一个全面的数据集，旨在支持进一步的研究。它包括图像、点云、2D 注释框和分割掩码、CAD 模型、3D 管道布线信息以及 P&ID（管道和仪表流程图）。对齐在一项实际案例研究中进行了实验，旨在通过结合分割和图匹配来减少完成此任务所需的时间。

title: Uniform error bounds for quantized dynamical models
summary: This paper provides statistical guarantees on the accuracy of dynamical models learned from dependent data sequences. Specifically, we develop uniform error bounds that apply to quantized models and imperfect optimization algorithms commonly used in practical contexts for system identification, and in particular hybrid system identification. Two families of bounds are obtained: slow-rate bounds via a block decomposition and fast-rate, variance-adaptive, bounds via a novel spaced-point strategy. The bounds scale with the number of bits required to encode the model and thus translate hardware constraints into interpretable statistical complexities.
tldr: The paper presents uniform error bounds for quantized dynamical models learned from dependent data, offering statistical guarantees for system identification and relating hardware constraints to statistical complexities.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了量化动态模型的统一误差界限，该模型从依赖数据序列中学习，为系统辨识提供了统计保证，并将硬件约束与统计复杂度联系起来。
summary_zh: 本文对从相关数据序列中学习的动态模型精度提供了统计保证。具体而言，我们针对在系统辨识，尤其是混合系统辨识的实际背景下常用的量化模型和不完善优化算法，开发了一致误差界。获得了两个系列的界：通过块分解得到的慢速率界和通过一种新颖的间隔点策略得到的快速率、方差自适应界。这些界随编码模型所需的比特数而变化，因此可以将硬件约束转化为可解释的统计复杂度。

title: Distributed Quantum Gaussian Processes for Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Gaussian Processes (GPs) are a powerful tool for probabilistic modeling, but their performance is often constrained in complex, largescale real-world domains due to the limited expressivity of classical kernels. Quantum computing offers the potential to overcome this limitation by embedding data into exponentially large Hilbert spaces, capturing complex correlations that remain inaccessible to classical computing approaches. In this paper, we propose a Distributed Quantum Gaussian Process (DQGP) method in a multiagent setting to enhance modeling capabilities and scalability. To address the challenging non-Euclidean optimization problem, we develop a Distributed consensus Riemannian Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (DR-ADMM) algorithm that aggregates local agent models into a global model. We evaluate the efficacy of our method through numerical experiments conducted on a quantum simulator in classical hardware. We use real-world, non-stationary elevation datasets of NASA's Shuttle Radar Topography Mission and synthetic datasets generated by Quantum Gaussian Processes. Beyond modeling advantages, our framework highlights potential computational speedups that quantum hardware may provide, particularly in Gaussian processes and distributed optimization.
tldr: This paper introduces a Distributed Quantum Gaussian Process (DQGP) method for multi-agent systems, leveraging quantum computing to enhance modeling capabilities and scalability, and it proposes a Distributed Riemannian ADMM algorithm for optimization, with evaluations on real-world and synthetic datasets using a quantum simulator.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于多智能体系统的分布式量子高斯过程（DQGP）方法，利用量子计算来增强建模能力和可扩展性。该方法还提出了一种分布式黎曼ADMM算法用于优化，并使用量子模拟器在真实世界和合成数据集上进行了评估。
summary_zh: 高斯过程(GP)是强大的概率建模工具，但由于经典核的表达能力有限，其性能在复杂的，大规模的现实世界领域中常常受到限制。量子计算提供了通过将数据嵌入到指数大的希尔伯特空间中来克服此限制的潜力，从而捕获经典计算方法无法访问的复杂相关性。在本文中，我们提出了一种多智能体设置下的分布式量子高斯过程(DQGP)方法，以增强建模能力和可扩展性。为了解决具有挑战性的非欧几里得优化问题，我们开发了一种分布式共识黎曼交替方向乘子法(DR-ADMM)算法，该算法将局部智能体模型聚合为全局模型。我们通过在经典硬件上的量子模拟器上进行的数值实验来评估我们方法的有效性。我们使用了美国宇航局航天飞机雷达地形测绘任务的真实世界，非平稳高程数据集以及由量子高斯过程生成的合成数据集。除了建模优势外，我们的框架还突出了量子硬件可能提供的潜在计算加速，尤其是在高斯过程和分布式优化方面。

title: Lyapunov-Based $\mathcal{L}_2$-Stable PI-Like Control of a Four-Wheel Independently Driven and Steered Robot
summary: In this letter, Lyapunov-based synthesis of a PI-like controller is proposed for $\mathcal{L}_2$-stable motion control of an independently driven and steered four-wheel mobile robot. An explicit, structurally verified model is used to enable systematic controller design with stability and performance guarantees suitable for real-time operation. A Lyapunov function is constructed to yield explicit bounds and $\mathcal{L}_2$ stability results, supporting feedback synthesis that reduces configuration dependent effects. The resulting control law maintains a PI-like form suitable for standard embedded implementation while preserving rigorous stability properties. Effectiveness and robustness are demonstrated experimentally on a real four-wheel mobile robot platform.
tldr: This paper presents a Lyapunov-based PI-like controller for stable motion control of a four-wheel independently driven and steered robot, validated through real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于 Lyapunov 的 PI 类控制器，用于四轮独立驱动和转向机器人的稳定运动控制，并通过实际实验验证。
summary_zh: 本论文提出了一种基于 Lyapunov 的 PI 型控制器综合方法，用于独立驱动和转向的四轮移动机器人的 $\mathcal{L}_2$ 稳定运动控制。采用一个显式的、结构验证的模型来实现系统化的控制器设计，并保证其稳定性和性能，使其适合实时运行。构建 Lyapunov 函数以产生显式边界和 $\mathcal{L}_2$ 稳定性结果，从而支持减少配置相关影响的反馈综合。最终得到的控制律保持了 PI 型形式，适用于标准嵌入式实现，同时保留了严格的稳定性。在真实的四轮移动机器人平台上进行了实验，验证了其有效性和鲁棒性。

title: OSCAR: An Ovipositor-Inspired Self-Propelling Capsule Robot for Colonoscopy
summary: Self-propelling robotic capsules eliminate shaft looping of conventional colonoscopy, reducing patient discomfort. However, reliably moving within the slippery, viscoelastic environment of the colon remains a significant challenge. We present OSCAR, an ovipositor-inspired self-propelling capsule robot that translates the transport strategy of parasitic wasps into a propulsion mechanism for colonoscopy. OSCAR mechanically encodes the ovipositor-inspired motion pattern through a spring-loaded cam system that drives twelve circumferential sliders in a coordinated, phase-shifted sequence. By tuning the motion profile to maximize the retract phase relative to the advance phase, the capsule creates a controlled friction anisotropy at the interface that generates net forward thrust. We developed an analytical model incorporating a Kelvin-Voigt formulation to capture the viscoelastic stick--slip interactions between the sliders and the tissue, linking the asymmetry between advance and retract phase durations to mean thrust, and slider-reversal synchronization to thrust stability. Comprehensive force characterization experiments in ex-vivo porcine colon revealed a mean steady-state traction force of 0.85 N, closely matching the model. Furthermore, experiments confirmed that thrust generation is speed-independent and scales linearly with the phase asymmetry, in agreement with theoretical predictions, underscoring the capsule's predictable performance and scalability. In locomotion validation experiments, OSCAR demonstrated robust performance, achieving an average speed of 3.08 mm/s, a velocity sufficient to match the cecal intubation times of conventional colonoscopy. By coupling phase-encoded friction anisotropy with a predictive model, OSCAR delivers controllable thrust generation at low normal loads, enabling safer and more robust self-propelling locomotion for robotic capsule colonoscopy.
tldr: The paper introduces OSCAR, an ovipositor-inspired self-propelling capsule robot for colonoscopy, demonstrating robust locomotion and speed comparable to conventional colonoscopy through phase-encoded friction anisotropy and a predictive model.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种受产卵器启发的自推进胶囊机器人 OSCAR，用于结肠镜检查。通过相位编码摩擦各向异性和预测模型，该机器人展示了强大的运动能力，其速度可与传统结肠镜检查相媲美。
summary_zh: 自推进式机器人胶囊消除了传统结肠镜的轴缠绕问题，降低了患者的不适感。然而，在结肠光滑、粘弹性的环境中可靠地移动仍然是一个重要的挑战。我们提出了OSCAR，一种受产卵器启发的自推进式胶囊机器人，它将寄生蜂的运输策略转化为结肠镜的推进机制。OSCAR 通过一个弹簧加载的凸轮系统，以机械方式编码受产卵器启发的运动模式，该系统驱动十二个圆周滑块以协调的、相移的序列运动。通过调整运动曲线以最大化相对于前进相的后退相，该胶囊在界面处产生可控的摩擦各向异性，从而产生净正向推力。我们开发了一个解析模型，该模型结合了 Kelvin-Voigt 公式来捕捉滑块和组织之间的粘弹性粘-滑相互作用，将前进和后退相位持续时间之间的不对称性与平均推力联系起来，并将滑块反转同步与推力稳定性联系起来。 在体外猪结肠中进行的全面力特性实验显示，平均稳态牵引力为0.85 N，与模型非常匹配。 此外，实验证实推力的产生与速度无关，并与相位不对称性呈线性关系，与理论预测一致，突出了胶囊的可预测性能和可扩展性。 在运动验证实验中，OSCAR 表现出稳健的性能，实现了平均速度 3.08 mm/s，该速度足以与传统结肠镜的盲肠插管时间相匹配。 通过将相位编码的摩擦各向异性与预测模型相结合，OSCAR 在低法向载荷下实现了可控的推力产生，从而为机器人胶囊结肠镜检查提供了更安全、更稳健的自推进运动。

title: Controlled oscillation modeling using port-Hamiltonian neural networks
summary: Learning dynamical systems through purely data-driven methods is challenging as they do not learn the underlying conservation laws that enable them to correctly generalize. Existing port-Hamiltonian neural network methods have recently been successfully applied for modeling mechanical systems. However, even though these methods are designed on power-balance principles, they usually do not consider power-preserving discretizations and often rely on Runge-Kutta numerical methods. In this work, we propose to use a second-order discrete gradient method embedded in the learning of dynamical systems with port-Hamiltonian neural networks. Numerical results are provided for three systems deliberately selected to span different ranges of dynamical behavior under control: a baseline harmonic oscillator with quadratic energy storage; a Duffing oscillator, with a non-quadratic Hamiltonian offering amplitude-dependent effects; and a self-sustained oscillator, which can stabilize in a controlled limit cycle through the incorporation of a nonlinear dissipation. We show how the use of this discrete gradient method outperforms the performance of a Runge-Kutta method of the same order. Experiments are also carried out to compare two theoretically equivalent port-Hamiltonian systems formulations and to analyze the impact of regularizing the Jacobian of port-Hamiltonian neural networks during training.
tldr: This paper introduces a second-order discrete gradient method within port-Hamiltonian neural networks for modeling controlled oscillatory systems, demonstrating improved performance over Runge-Kutta methods and analyzing different system formulations.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种在端口-哈密顿神经网络中使用的二阶离散梯度方法，用于建模受控振荡系统。实验结果表明，该方法比龙格-库塔方法性能更好，并分析了不同的系统公式。
summary_zh: 通过纯粹的数据驱动方法学习动力系统极具挑战性，因为这些方法无法学习到潜在的守恒定律，从而无法正确地泛化。现有的端口哈密顿神经网络方法最近已成功应用于机械系统建模。然而，即使这些方法是基于功率平衡原理设计的，它们通常不考虑保功率离散化，并且经常依赖于龙格-库塔数值方法。在这项工作中，我们建议在端口哈密顿神经网络学习动力系统的过程中嵌入二阶离散梯度方法。我们为三种经过精心挑选的系统提供了数值结果，这些系统涵盖了控制下的不同动力行为范围：具有二次能量存储的基线谐振子；具有非二次哈密顿量的杜芬振子，提供幅度依赖效应；以及一个自激振荡器，可以通过引入非线性耗散来稳定在一个受控的极限环中。我们展示了这种离散梯度方法如何优于相同阶次的龙格-库塔方法的性能。还进行了实验，比较了两种理论上等价的端口哈密顿系统公式，并分析了在训练期间对端口哈密顿神经网络的雅可比矩阵进行正则化的影响。

title: Scenario Approach with Post-Design Certification of User-Specified Properties
summary: The scenario approach is an established data-driven design framework that comes equipped with a powerful theory linking design complexity to generalization properties. In this approach, data are simultaneously used both for design and for certifying the design's reliability, without resorting to a separate test dataset. This paper takes a step further by guaranteeing additional properties, useful in post-design usage but not considered during the design phase. To this end, we introduce a two-level framework of appropriateness: baseline appropriateness, which guides the design process, and post-design appropriateness, which serves as a criterion for a posteriori evaluation. We provide distribution-free upper bounds on the risk of failing to meet the post-design appropriateness; these bounds are computable without using any additional test data. Under additional assumptions, lower bounds are also derived. As part of an effort to demonstrate the usefulness of the proposed methodology, the paper presents two practical examples in H2 and pole-placement problems. Moreover, a method is provided to infer comprehensive distributional knowledge of relevant performance indexes from the available dataset.
tldr: This paper introduces a two-level scenario approach, certifying user-specified properties *after* design without needing extra test data, providing upper and lower risk bounds and showcasing examples in control problems.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种双层场景方法，可以在设计*之后*验证用户指定的特性，而不需要额外的测试数据，提供了风险的上下界，并在控制问题中进行了案例展示。
summary_zh: 情景方法是一种成熟的数据驱动设计框架，它配备了强大的理论，能将设计复杂性与泛化特性联系起来。在这种方法中，数据被同时用于设计和验证设计的可靠性，无需单独的测试数据集。本文更进一步，保证了在设计阶段未考虑但在设计完成后使用中具有价值的额外特性。为此，我们引入了一个两层适用性框架：指导设计过程的基准适用性和作为后验评估标准的后设计适用性。我们提供了满足后设计适用性失败风险的无分布上限；这些上限可以在不使用任何额外测试数据的情况下计算。在额外的假设下，也推导出了下限。作为证明所提出方法实用性的努力的一部分，本文展示了H2和极点配置问题中的两个实际案例。此外，还提供了一种方法，可以从可用数据集中推断相关性能指标的全面分布知识。
